grants.title: HFSP Research Grant — Program Grant
grants.description: High-risk, high-reward basic life science research through international teams. India-based PIs can lead or join. One of the most prestigious international grants for life sciences.

grants.title: ICGEB Arturo Falaschi SMART Fellowship (Mar 2026)
grants.description: Scientific Mobility for Advanced Research Training. 3–9 months at any ICGEB Member State lab (not home country). Open to PhD students and postdocs (PhD ≤5 years). Stipend USD 800–2,000/month + bench fee + travel.

grants.title: ICGEB Short-term PhD Fellowship (Mar 2026)
grants.description: 1–12 months at ICGEB labs in Trieste (Italy), New Delhi (India), or Cape Town (SA). For collaborative predoctoral research. Indian applicants may apply to Trieste or Cape Town (not New Delhi — home country rule). Monthly stipend + travel + health insurance.

grants.title: ICGEB Biosecurity Fellowship — Biological Threat Training (Mar 2026)
grants.description: 2–6 months at ICGEB labs (Trieste, New Delhi, Cape Town). Focus: molecular detection of biological threats, epidemiology, genomic surveillance, drug discovery, vaccine development, diagnostics. Co-funded by Norwegian Agency (UNODA/BWCISU). Directly relevant to AMR.

grants.title: ICGEB CRP Research Grant 2026
grants.description: ICGEB Collaborative Research Programme (CRP). Supports original research in basic science, human healthcare, industrial/agricultural biotechnology and bioenergy. India is a member state — up to 3 CRP + 2 Early Career Return grants per call. International collaboration mandatory.
eligibility: Researcher at ICGEB Member State institution

grants.title: ICGEB Early Career Return Grant (CRP)
grants.description: Part of ICGEB CRP call. For young PIs returning to ICGEB Member States after postdoctoral training abroad. Supports setting up independent labs. Up to 2 awards per member country per call.

grants.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-23-291 -- AHRQ Understanding and Improving Diagnostic Safety in Ambulatory Care: Incidence and Contributing Factors (R01).
grants.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-005 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

grants.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-24-154 -- AHRQ Health Services Research Projects (R01) is expired.
grants.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-006 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

grants.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-24-155 -- AHRQ Small Health Services Research Grant Program (R03).
grants.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-007 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

grants.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-24-266 -- Using Innovative Digital Healthcare Solutions to Improve Quality at the Point of Care (R21/R33 - Clinical Trial Optional).
grants.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-008 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

grants.title: Notice to Expire PAR-24-298, "Mechanism for Time-Sensitive Substance Use Research (R21 Clinical Trial Optional)"
grants.description: Notice NOT-DA-26-010 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

grants.title: Request for Information (RFI): Gathering feedback for the National Eye Institute 2026-2031 Strategic Plan.
grants.description: Notice NOT-EY-26-002 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

grants.title: Notice of Change: Early Expiration of PAR-25-326 Ultra-Rare Gene-based Therapy (URGenT) Network Resource Access (X01, Clinical Trial Not Allowed)
grants.description: Notice NOT-NS-26-032 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

grants.title: Fulbright-Nehru Doctoral Research Fellowship
grants.description: 6–9 months dissertation research in the United States. Priority: AI, energy, space science, defense.

grants.title: Fulbright-Nehru Postdoctoral Research Fellowship
grants.description: 8–24 months at a US institution. For Indian early career researchers in science, technology, and innovation fields.

grants.title: EMBL Predoctoral Fellowship (PhD Programme)
grants.description: Fully funded PhD positions at EMBL sites across Europe. Annual intake. Indian applicants eligible and encouraged.

grants.title: Wellcome India Alliance — Intermediate Fellowship
grants.description: For Indian researchers with a strong track record seeking independence. Covers salary, research costs, training.

grants.title: EMBO Installation Grant
grants.description: Supports researchers returning to or establishing labs in EMBC member states and associate member countries including India.

grants.title: Grand Challenges Explorations — Open Call
grants.description: Supports bold ideas in global health and development. India-based researchers strongly encouraged.

grants.title: NIH PAR — Exploratory/Developmental Research (R21)
grants.description: Supports new, untested ideas and approaches. Collaborative grants with US PI may include Indian co-investigators.

grants.title: IUSSTF Indo-US Joint Research Program
grants.description: Joint research grants for Indian and US researchers. Covers exchanges, workshops, and collaborative projects.

grants.title: PAR Foundation 2026 Grant — Beyond Antibiotics
grants.description: 2026 theme: 'Beyond Antibiotics: Preventive Strategies That Lower the Need for Antibiotic Use.' Supports research reducing infection risk and improving antimicrobial stewardship. Global applicants welcome including India.

grants.title: Google India Research Award
grants.description: Supports faculty at Indian universities engaged in world-class research relevant to Google. Sub-track for early-career faculty (within 5 years). Annual call.

grants.title: For Postdoctoral Researchers
grants.description: NIH Fogarty International: For Postdoctoral Researchers

grants.title: HFSP Long-Term Fellowship
grants.description: 3-year postdoctoral fellowship in a different country/discipline. Strongly interdisciplinary. Annual call.

grants.title: PAR Foundation 2026 Grant — Beyond Antibiotics
grants.description: 2026 theme: 'Beyond Antibiotics: Preventive Strategies That Lower the Need for Antibiotic Use.' Supports AMR prevention research and educational initiatives. Global applicants including India eligible.

grants.title: ICGEB Arturo Falaschi Postdoctoral Fellowship
grants.description: Postdoctoral training at ICGEB labs in Trieste, New Delhi, or Cape Town. Average 2 years. Competitive package: stipend + health insurance + research costs. Top fellows eligible for Early Career Return Grants after completion.

grants.title: ICGEB-JNU PhD Fellowship (India-specific)
grants.description: PhD positions at ICGEB New Delhi in collaboration with JNU. Requires valid CSIR/UGC/ICMR/DBT/DST-INSPIRE/BINC JRF. Annual intake. Full stipend + world-class research environment.

grants.title: Wellcome India Alliance — Early Career Fellowship
grants.description: 5-year fellowship for researchers who have completed PhD ≤ 5 years ago. Covers salary, research costs, and training. Highly competitive.

grants.title: Wellcome India Alliance — Intermediate Fellowship
grants.description: For established Indian researchers seeking independence. 5-year award with salary and substantial research budget.

grants.title: Wellcome India Alliance — Senior Fellowship
grants.description: 5-year award for researchers with strong independent track record. Covers full research program costs.

grants.title: Find a Young Investigator, Installation Grantee or Global Investigator
grants.description: EMBO funding opportunity: Find a Young Investigator, Installation Grantee or Global Investigator

grants.title: EMBCFunding for EMBO
grants.description: EMBO funding opportunity: EMBCFunding for EMBO

grants.title: Travel to EMBO officeTravel directions to the EMBO Offices in Heidelberg
grants.description: EMBO funding opportunity: Travel to EMBO officeTravel directions to the EMBO Offices in Heidelberg

grants.title: EMBL Postdoctoral Fellowship (EIPOD)
grants.description: EMBL Interdisciplinary Postdoctoral (EIPOD) programme at Heidelberg and other sites. Interdisciplinary life science research. Biannual calls.

grants.title: EMBO Workshop Organizing Grant
grants.description: Scientists can apply to organize an EMBO Workshop anywhere in the world, including India. Core funding up to €35,000 + €5,500 for participant travel grants + €1,000 childcare + €1,000 accessibility = up to €42,500. EMBO handles registration, abstract submission, and workshop webpage. Highly relevant for faculty hosting life science conferences.
eligibility: Any EMBO Member State or beyond

grants.title: EMBO Lecture Course Organizing Grant
grants.description: EMBO funds practical lecture courses in life sciences. Organisers apply to run intensive training courses. Supports curriculum, invited speakers, and participant scholarships. Can be hosted in India.

grants.title: EMBL Course and Conference Travel Grant
grants.amount: Variable cap per event (travel + accommodation + registration)
grants.description: EMBL provides travel grants for researchers to attend EMBL/EMBO courses and conferences. Covers airfare, accommodation, visa, registration fees. Apply during abstract/motivation letter submission for each event. Selection based on scientific merit, location, career stage.

grants.title: EMBO Postdoctoral Fellowship (Spring/Autumn Rounds)
grants.description: Supports excellent postdocs for up to 2 years at labs in EMBC member states. International mobility required. Includes salary/stipend, relocation allowance, childcare support. From 2026: Spring round deadline = 4th Friday of January.

grants.title: EMBO Scientific Exchange Grant
grants.description: Supports short scientific visits to labs in EMBC member/associate countries. Rolling deadline, decisions within 6 weeks.

grants.title: EMBO Short-Term Fellowship
grants.description: Up to 3 months at EMBC member country lab. For PhD students and postdocs. Rolling applications.

grants.title: FEBS Short-Term Fellowship
grants.description: Supports short research visits (1–3 months) to a lab in a different country. Open to researchers from FEBS constituent societies.

grants.title: FEBS Science for Life Laboratory Prize
grants.description: Annual FEBS prize for outstanding contributions to molecular life sciences. Includes travel to FEBS Congress.
Travel grant for Indian PhD students/researchers. Source: AdhyaSuman/International_Travel_Grants (GitHub).

grants.title: ACM-India: IARCS Travel Grants
grants.description: Travel grant for Indian PhD students/researchers. Source: AdhyaSuman/International_Travel_Grants (GitHub). Contact: travelgrants@iarcs.org.in

grants.title: ANRF: International Travel Support
grants.description: Travel grant for Indian PhD students/researchers. Source: AdhyaSuman/International_Travel_Grants (GitHub). Contact: ms.its@serb.gov.in

grants.title: CSIR Travel Grant
grants.description: Travel grant for Indian PhD students/researchers. Source: AdhyaSuman/International_Travel_Grants (GitHub). Contact: tgsm@csirhrdg.res.in
Travel grant for Indian PhD students/researchers. Source: AdhyaSuman/International_Travel_Grants (GitHub).

grants.title: ACM-RFG
grants.description: Travel grant for Indian PhD students/researchers. Source: AdhyaSuman/International_Travel_Grants (GitHub). Contact: acmirfg@acmindia.org

grants.title: Georg Forster Research Fellowship (AvH) — India-eligible
grants.description: For researchers from developing/transition countries (incl. India) to conduct research in Germany for 6–24 months. All disciplines. Highly prestigious. Rolling deadline — no fixed call. Strong publication record needed. Covers salary, travel, family allowance.

grants.title: Humboldt Research Fellowship for Postdoctoral Researchers
grants.description: 6–24 months at a German university/research institution. Open to Indian researchers with PhD ≤4 years. Any discipline. Rolling deadline — apply anytime. One of the most prestigious postdoc fellowships worldwide.

grants.title: Humboldt Research Fellowship for Experienced Researchers
grants.description: For senior researchers (>4 years post-PhD) to work in Germany for 6–18 months. All disciplines. Highly prestigious. Can be split visits. India has one of the highest success rates globally.

grants.title: Humboldt Research Award
grants.description: Prestigious award for internationally recognised researchers in any discipline. Nominated by German academics — cannot self-apply. Carries €60,000 prize and extended research stay in Germany.

grants.title: Novo Nordisk Foundation Challenge Programme — Open Call
grants.amount: Varies by call (up to DKK millions)
grants.description: NNF Challenge Programmes tackle specific global health/life science problems. Some calls explicitly open to international (including Indian) collaborators. Focus areas: infectious disease, antimicrobial resistance, metabolic disease, data science for health. Check current open calls.

grants.title: NNF Data Science Research Infrastructure Grant
grants.description: Supports computational biology, bioinformatics, and data science research infrastructure. Increasingly open to global collaborations. India-based researchers with Danish collaborators are eligible.

grants.title: Royal Society Newton International Fellowship
grants.description: 2-year fellowship for early career non-UK researchers to work at UK institutions. All disciplines. India-eligible. Strong career development — alumni network is highly connected. Annual call.

grants.title: Royal Society International Exchanges — Cost Share
grants.description: Seed funding for new collaborations between UK and international researchers. India participates in the Cost Share scheme (funded by both RS and Indian agency). Covers short visits and workshops up to £12,000. Rolling deadline.

grants.title: DAAD Research Stays for University Academics (India)
grants.amount: Monthly allowance + travel (as per DAAD norms)
grants.description: Short research stays (1–3 months) at German universities for Indian faculty. Covers travel and accommodation. No age limit. Also includes bilateral exchange for PhD students.

grants.title: DST-DAAD Personnel Exchange Programme (PPP) — Indo-German
grants.amount: Travel + per diem (DST norms for Indian side)
grants.description: Bilateral MoU between DAAD and DST. Supports researcher exchanges for joint research projects. Indian PI applies to DST; German PI to DAAD. Covers travel + per diem for both teams. Well-established channel.

grants.title: DAAD WISE Scholarship (Women in STEM)
grants.description: For women engineering/science students from India for summer internships at top German universities. Highly competitive, well-regarded. Also increases visibility for follow-on collaborations.

grants.title: Microsoft: MSR India Academic Outreach
grants.description: Travel grant for Indian PhD students/researchers. Source: AdhyaSuman/International_Travel_Grants (GitHub). Contact: travelgrants@microsoft.com

grants.title: Google: Conference Scholarships
grants.description: Travel grant for Indian PhD students/researchers. Source: AdhyaSuman/International_Travel_Grants (GitHub). Contact: research-programs-in@google.com
